steps.assistant_text: 2-field setter with delay-slot filling. Writing a0[5]=a1; a0[4]=0 in that source order lets IDO -O2 schedule the zero-store into the jr ra delay slot. 100% match.

metadata.verification: Verified via objdump: build/.o bytes match asm/nonmatchings/.s word-for-word (3 insns: sw a1 0x14, jr ra, sw zero 0x10 in delay).
